memoryArtifacts.headline: Elizabeth, in French Élisabeth Candavène (c. 1180 – 1240/1247)
memoryArtifacts.description: Elizabeth, in French Élisabeth Candavène (c. 1180 – 1240/1247), was the countess of Saint-Pol from 1205 until her death, although her effective rule was limited to the periods 1219–1222 and 1226–1227. …

popularStory.description: Elizabeth, in French Élisabeth Candavène (c. 1180 – 1240/1247), was the countess of Saint-Pol from 1205 until her death, although her effective rule was limited to the periods 1219–1222 and 1226–1227. …

zh.Frévent,62361,Pas-de-Calais,Hauts-de-Fra: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth de SAINT-POL於1180年5月30日出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾時，她的父親Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol28歲，母親Yolande de Hainaut35歲。她於1196年5月30日與Gaucher III de CHATILLON在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1232年4月24日在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth de SAINT-POL于1180年5月30日出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾时，她的父亲Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol28岁，母亲Yolande de Hainaut35岁。她于1196年5月30日与Gaucher III de CHATILLON在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1232年4月24日在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷維特享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth de SAINT-POL was born on 30 May 1180, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol, was 28 and her mother, Yolande de Hainaut, was 35. She married Gaucher III de CHATILLON on 30 May 1196, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 April 1232, in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth de SAINT-POL est née le 30 mai 1180, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Hainaut, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Gaucher III de CHATILLON le 30 mai 1196, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 avril 1232, à Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth de SAINT-POL am 30. Mai 1180 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol 28 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Hainaut 35. Sie hat am 30. Mai 1196 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Gaucher III de CHATILLON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. April 1232 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de SAINT-POL è nata il il 30 maggio 1180 nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Yolande de Hainaut, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Gaucher III de CHATILLON il 30 maggio 1196, nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 aprile 1232, nel Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de SAINT-POLが1180年5月30日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで生まれた時，父Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Polは28歳，母Yolande de Hainautは35歳であった。1196年5月30日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼでGaucher III de CHATILLONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1232年4月24日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフルeベントで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth de SAINT-POL(이)가 1180년 5월 30일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Hainaut(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1196년 5월 30일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 Gaucher III de CHATILLON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1232년 4월 24일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프e븐트에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.30 MAY 1180–24 APR 1232: 1180 оны Тавдугаар сарын 30–1232 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 24

pt.30 MAY 1180–24 APR 1232: 30 de maio de 1180–24 de abril de 1232
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth de SAINT-POL nasceu em 30 de maio de 1180, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Hainaut, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Gaucher III de CHATILLON em 30 de maio de 1196, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de abril de 1232, em Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth de SAINT-POL родилась 30 мая 1180 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Hainaut, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gaucher III de CHATILLON 30 мая 1196 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 апреля 1232 г. в местности фрeвент, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.30 MAY 1180–24 APR 1232: 30 de mayo de 1180–24 de abril de 1232
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth de SAINT-POL nació el 30 de mayo de 1180, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Hugues IV de Saint-Pol, Comte de Saint-Pol, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Yolande de Hainaut, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Gaucher III de CHATILLON el 30 de mayo de 1196, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de abril de 1232, en Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
